query:
DELETE FROM resources WHERE title LIKE '%Trench Work Series%';

INSERT INTO resources (title, description, category, fileType, url, published, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2R8Hw4VBpxrrDge.root --database KoRED62UaUJB6FH9jFpuEG --execute DELETE FROM resources WHERE title LIKE '%Trench Work Series%';
